title: Attack of the Southern Fried Zombies
original_title: Attack of the Southern Fried Zombies
overview: Lonnie, a crop duster pilot, must lead a mismatched group of survivors to escape the deadly zombie horde after an experimental chemical, intended to control the invasive kudzu vine, transforms the citizens of Charleston, MS into zombies.
